Apple Pay now lets you pay using American Express points

fullArticle:
American Express has announced a new way for cardholders to redeem their rewards points: they can be used to pay for Apple Pay transactions. Here are the details.

Starting today, Apple Pay users can use their American Express points to pay for everyday transactions, right within the Apple Pay interface.

When checking out online or in stores, American Express cardholders will see the option to select ‘Use Rewards’ instead of putting the full charge on the card itself.

Here are more details, directly from the American Express press release:

Eligible Card Members can apply Membership Rewards points directly within the existing online or in apps Apple Pay payment experience — without needing to leave checkout, open another app or complete additional redemption steps. Here’s how:
